zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Pitway於1427年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾巴頓時，她的父親Edward Pitway37歲，母親Suzanne24歲。她於大約1450年與William Reade在英國英格蘭越可爾巴頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1488年在英國英格蘭越可爾巴頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Pitway于1427年出生在英国英格兰越可爾巴頓时，她的父亲Edward Pitway37岁，母亲Suzanne24岁。她于大约1450年与William Reade在英国英格兰越可爾巴頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1488年在英国英格兰越可爾巴頓享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Pitway was born in 1427, in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Pitway, was 37 and her mother, Suzanne, was 24. She married William Reade about 1450, in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1488, in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Pitway est née en 1427, à Barton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Pitway, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Suzanne, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Reade environ 1450, à Barton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1488, à Barton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Pitway 1427 in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Pitway 37 und ihre Mutter Suzanne 24. Sie hat um 1450 in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom William Reade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1488 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pitway è nata il nel 1427 nel Barton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edward Pitway, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Suzanne, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William Reade circa 1450, nel Barton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1488, nel Barton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Pitwayが1427年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父Edward Pitwayは37歳，母Suzanneは24歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバートンでWilliam Readeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1488年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバートンで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアボアルスタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Pitway(이)가 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Pitway(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Suzanne(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바턴에서 William Reade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 보르스탤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pitway nasceu em 1427, em Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Pitway, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Suzanne, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William Reade aproximadamente 1450, em Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1488, em Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Pitway родилась в 1427 г. в местности бартон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Pitway было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Suzanne, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Reade около 1450 г. в местности бартон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1488 г. в местности бартон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности боарсталл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Pitway nació en 1427, en Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Pitway, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Suzanne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William Reade aproximadamente 1450, en Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1488, en Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
